channel.title: Sweet Bites by Laura
channel.description: We are inspired by the joy that homemade cookies and candies bring

item.title: Paper molds for Baking cupcakes on a white concrete background and ingredients: Flour, Eggs, cane sugar, whisk, milk, spices in measuring spoons, skewers for cupcakes. Copy Space. Top View.
item.dc:creator: sweetbitesbylaura

item.title: concept-homemade-baking-is-marble-rolling-pin-flour-butter-milk-white-background-copy-space-top-view-baking-concept-flat-lay
item.dc:creator: sweetbitesbylaura
item.excerpt:encoded: The concept of homemade baking is a marble rolling pin, flour, butter, milk on a white background. Copy space. Top view. Baking concept. flat lay
